briefdescription.para: Setup this struct from serialized color-theme file.
Setup this struct from Json value.

detaileddescription.para: Setup this struct from current application colors, and serialize them to file gets scene colors from first ObjectMesh, if it is present gets active viewport background color
Setup this struct from current application colors, and serialize them to jsonValue gets scene colors from first ObjectMesh, if it is present gets active viewport background color

briefdescription.para: True if this structure is filled with colors, false if empty.
Getter and setter for ribbon colors.
Getter and setter for viewport colors.
Returns directory where user's custom themes are stored.
Return list of found custom themes.
Reset ImGui style sizes and colors, and apply menu scaling to it.
Connects given slot to receive signal on every Color Theme change, triggered in apply.

detaileddescription.para: Applies colors stored in this struct to application really some colors of this theme are applied deferred on next frame because of ImGui::PushStyleColor problem note that struct should be initialized when apply is called initialized in this scope means that structure has it's own values for colors
This singleton is born to manage color-themes loading and saving, and apply it to app It can handle scene colors (default mesh colors, etc.) and Dear ImGui colors
